---
title: "Annual input data"
---

{{< include ../_includes/sprfmo-banner.qmd >}}

<div class="paper-title">Annual Input Data Contract</div>

The adopted CMP specification must replace this template with exact series and
rules. Until then, this page defines the minimum metadata required for each
candidate test and annual dry run.

| Field | Requirement |
|---|---|
| Series identifier | Exact name used by the implementation |
| Provider | Responsible institution and contact point |
| Unit and scale | Including any thousands/millions convention |
| Spatial and fleet coverage | Exact area, fleet, and aggregation |
| Observation period | Months/seasons represented |
| Management-year cutoff | Latest acceptable receipt date |
| Revision status | Preliminary, revised, or final |
| Missing-data rule | Stop, carry forward, omit, or approved substitute |
| Transformation | Standardization, smoothing, averaging, or rescaling |
| Checksum | Hash of the archived input file |

## Validation classes

1. **Schema:** expected columns, types, names, years, and uniqueness.
2. **Units:** expected magnitude and explicit conversion.
3. **Completeness:** required years and indices are present.
4. **Plausibility:** changes outside documented bounds are flagged, not
   automatically corrected.
5. **Vintage:** the source date and revision state are recorded.
6. **Identity:** the archived file checksum matches the calculation record.

Missing or revised data must follow the adopted specification. Analysts should
not invent a replacement rule during the annual calculation.
